summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Interview Assistant v2.0 completed successfully. Backend APIs 100% functional with all new authenticity features. Frontend 95% functional with excellent implementation of AI Assistant Panel and Knowledge Authenticity Analysis features.

AI Assistant history endpoint - retrieves chat logs properly
Dashboard loading with new Authenticity and AI Usage stats cards

Candidate pre-check page with AI Assistant notice
Pre-check page AI Assistant detailed explanation display
